mitre: T1110 - Brute Force, T1078 - Valid Accounts
recommended_action: Escalate immediately, isolate host, preserve evidence, and review account activity.
analyst_notes: Repeated failures against a privileged account from an external address. Success after failures increases likelihood of account compromise.
false_positive_handling: Check before escalation: Check change ticket or emergency access record before containment. Confirm whether this IP belongs to an approved administrator VPN range.

mitre: T1071 - Application Layer Protocol, T1059 - Command and Scripting Interpreter
recommended_action: Escalate immediately, isolate host, preserve evidence, and review account activity.
analyst_notes: Encoded command execution should be correlated with parent process and recent downloads. Network activity following encoded execution should be treated as suspicious until validated.
false_positive_handling: Check before escalation: Some admin tools use encoded PowerShell during endpoint management. Verify whether destination is part of a known software update or management service.

mitre: T1087 - Account Discovery, T1041 - Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
recommended_action: Investigate within SLA, enrich source IP, and validate endpoint telemetry.
analyst_notes: Discovery from a finance workstation should be reviewed with recent login and process history. Archive creation after discovery may indicate staging activity.
false_positive_handling: Check before escalation: Check whether IT support was troubleshooting local account permissions. Confirm whether the user was performing an approved finance export.

recommended_action: Queue for analyst review and correlate with recent authentication events.
analyst_notes: Blocked execution still needs user-awareness follow-up if delivered through email.
false_positive_handling: Check before escalation: Review file hash and email gateway verdict before closing as prevented.

recommended_action: Monitor and close if no additional suspicious activity appears.
analyst_notes: Low-confidence internet scanning pattern with no authentication attempt.
false_positive_handling: Check before escalation: Confirm this is not the company vulnerability scanner before blocking.
